texto: I have learnt that trusting another takes a leap of faith
autor: taking a risk and putting emotions on the line. This is in the hope that the other will accept and understand you.
explicacao: Citação de taking a risk and putting emotions on the line. This is in the hope that the other will accept and understand you. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I have learnt that trusting another takes a leap of faith” articula reflexao, aisha-mirza, learnt em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
